description: Creates a 3D line from parametric equations in the form x = x0 + at, y = y0 + bt, z = z0 + ct.
utility: Create a 3D line from parametric equations

arguments.name: equation
arguments.description: Comma-separated parametric equations - e.g., "x = 1 + 2t, y = 3 - t, z = 2 + 4t"

examples.expression:
G = g3d(at(4,23), view(30, 30))
L = parametricline3d(G, "x = 1 + 2t, y = 3 - t, z = 2 + 4t")

examples.scenario: Line through origin along (1,1,1) with color
examples.expression:
G = g3d(at(4,23), view(30, 30))
L = parametricline3d(G, "x = t, y = t, z = t", c(blue))
